caption: vsausyd 1 d 🔥THE GRILL IS HOT... AND SO IS THIS EVENT🔥 Smoky, juicy, and packed with flavour 😋 VSA is serving up ICONIC nem nướng and you won’t want to miss it. Come through, grab a skewer, and enjoy one of Vietnam’s most iconic street foods with friends Get in quick before they’re gone 😮🔥 📆: 25/3/26, 2pm-4pm 📍: International Students Lounge (ISL) 💵: FREE for all members | $5 for non members
alt: Photo by VSA at University Of Sydney on March 21, 2026. May be an image of skewer, sausage, poster and text that says "VSA VSAPRESENTS... PRESENTS... NEM NUONG DATE: 25/03 DATE:25/03 03 WEDNESDAY 4.00 PM 2.00 PM OUR LOCATION: INTERNATIONAL STUDENT LOUNGE".
